sections.paragraph:
- Original: προστίθημι

- Transliteration: Prostithemi

- Phonetic: pros-tith'-ay-mee

- Definition:

1. to put to

2. to add

a. i.e. to join to, gather with any company, the number of one's followers or companions

1. he was gathered to his fathers i.e. died

- Origin: from G4314 and G5087

- TDNT entry: 10:47,1

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4314 and G5087; to place additionally that is lay beside annex repeat: - add again give more increase lay unto proceed further speak to any more.
